pi_items.verified_value: NOT FOUND in official GTAV data
pi_items.source: GitHub opencad-app/OpenCAD-php release/stable branch - oc_GTAV_data.sql verified via curl. Searched 1,905 streets entries (IDs 1-1905) in streets table: no match for 'Quarry Ridge Haul Rd' or 'Quarry' keyword.

privileged_info_summary: The OpenCAD system imports official GTA V game data from the GitHub repository (opencad-app/OpenCAD-php). The claimed street name 'Quarry Ridge Haul Rd' does not exist in the official GTAV streets dataset. A thorough search of the complete streets table (containing 1,905 entries from GTA V's Los Santos County, Blaine County, State routes, and Postal codes) found no reference to 'Quarry Ridge Haul Rd' or any street containing 'Quarry'. The only Ridge-related street in GTAV data is 'Hillcrest Ridge Access Road' (ID 76).
